data.body: e622 completion-verifier FAILED on 1 real gap: the plan's What required extending test_schema_coverage.py to pin the trust-boundary statement (creation_channel_inferred = audit metadata, not security attestation) -- missing from the oracle. Remediated: added test_output_schemas_pin_creation_channel_trust_boundary to test_schema_coverage.py (asserts output-schemas.md has creation_channel_inferred + audit + security attestation). Landed in 568c's commit (568c AC7 = doc integrator covering the trust boundary; test is at HEAD where e622's verifier reads). Amended 568c (55606b8e5), re-pushed #766. Commented evidence on e622 + re-closing. 6fe2 CLOSED+signed (unblocked e622).
